evals.prompt: /boost I want to add a settings page to my Reflex app
evals.expected_output: A structured implementation plan prompt with sections for task, context, requirements, deliverables, and success criteria. No implementation code.

assertions.name: no-implementation-code
assertions.description: Output must not contain fenced code blocks with implementation logic (python/sql/js with actual statements)

assertions.name: structured-sections
assertions.description: Output contains at least 3 markdown ## sections (e.g. Task, Requirements, Deliverables, Success criteria)

assertions.name: mentions-reflex
assertions.description: Output mentions Reflex (the framework) by name

assertions.name: has-success-criteria
assertions.description: Output contains a success criteria or verification section explaining how to confirm the task is done

evals.prompt: refine this prompt: add email notifications when a task is completed
evals.expected_output: A refined prompt specifying trigger conditions, email provider/library, template format, error handling, and success criteria. No code.

assertions.name: no-implementation-code
assertions.description: Output must not contain fenced code blocks with implementation logic

assertions.name: specifies-trigger-condition
assertions.description: Output specifies what exactly triggers the notification (e.g. which state change, which event, which status)

assertions.name: mentions-email-provider-or-library
assertions.description: Output mentions an email library or service (e.g. SMTP, SendGrid, resend, smtplib, etc.)

assertions.name: mentions-error-handling
assertions.description: Output addresses failure scenarios (e.g. delivery failure, invalid address, retry logic)

assertions.name: structured-sections
assertions.description: Output contains at least 3 markdown ## sections

evals.prompt: help me write a prompt for migrating our SQLite database to PostgreSQL
evals.expected_output: A structured prompt covering migration strategy, schema mapping, data migration, rollback plan, and testing criteria. No code.

assertions.name: no-implementation-code
assertions.description: Output must not contain fenced SQL or Python migration scripts

assertions.name: mentions-rollback-or-safety
assertions.description: Output addresses rollback strategy or data safety (backup, dry run, etc.)

assertions.name: mentions-data-integrity
assertions.description: Output mentions verification of data integrity after migration

assertions.name: structured-sections
assertions.description: Output contains at least 3 markdown ## sections

assertions.name: has-out-of-scope
assertions.description: Output contains an explicit 'Out of scope' or constraint section
